mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, discount_amount, shipping_fee, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, payment_method, pay_time, delivery_time, complete_time, cancel_time, remark, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{shippingFee}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{paymentMethod}, #{payTime}, #{deliveryTime}, #{completeTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET total_amount = #{totalAmount}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, shipping_fee = #{shippingFee}, status = #{status}, receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, receiver_address = #{receiverAddress}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, pay_time = #{payTime}, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 0 AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE) LIMIT #{limit}
